MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th January 1971 G.8.R. 116.—The following Order made by the Preident on 20th January, 1971 is published for general information:— The State of Jlimachal Pradesh (Removal of Difficulties) Order No, 1. In exercise of the powers conferred by section 53 of the State of Himachal PradeBh Act, 1970 (53 of 1970), the President hereby makes the following Order, namely:— 1. (1) ThiB Order may be called the State of Himachal Pradesh (Removal of Difflcultiea) Order No, 1. (2) It shall come Into force at once. 2 The Governor of the State of Himachal Pradesh shall, before entering upon his office on the 25th day of January, 1971, make and subscribe the oath or affirma- tion prescribed in article 159 in the presence of the Chief Justice of the High Court for that State, or in his absence, the seniormost Judge of that Court available, notwithstanding that auch Chief Justice or Judge has not made and subscribed the oath or affirmation under article 219. V. V. GIRI, President [No, J0/1/71-SR.1 M. G.
